query: SELECT id, name, status FROM projects WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND name NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Segurança%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Acesso%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Persistência%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Transições%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Histórico%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Action Plans%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute SELECT id, name, status FROM projects WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND name NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Segurança%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Acesso%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Persistência%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Transições%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Histórico%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Action Plans%' LIMIT 20;
